headline: How Investors Are Reacting To GEHC’s FDA-Cleared Photon-Counting CT And New Cardiology Platform Push
summary: In late March 2026, GE HealthCare Technologies received U.S. FDA 510(k) clearance for its Photonova Spectra photon-counting CT system and showcased a suite of cardiology innovations spanning CT, ultrasound, ECG fleet management, and interventional imaging collaborations to support precision care across the full cardiology pathway. The combination of AI-enabled photon-counting CT, Deep Silicon detector technology, cloud-connected device management, and new interventional partnerships...
